plot outline: This movie follows a day in the life of Eddie Mannix (Josh Brolin), a Hollywood fixer for Capitol Pictures in the 1950s, who cleans up and solves problems for big names and stars in the industry. But when studio star Baird Whitlock (George Clooney) disappears, Mannix has to deal with more than just the fix.
title: Hail, Caesar!
akas: Hail, Caesar! A Tale of The Christ (United States)
ヘイル、シーザー！ (Japan, Japanese title)

distributors.name: Universal Sony Pictures Home Entertainment Nordic
